segments.text: The human brain is a highly complex organ that controls various functions.
ficial intelligence is becoming increasingly integrated into daily life.
ition and machine learning are vital areas of research.
science has revealed much about brain plasticity.
gical systems mirror some of the processes found in artificial networks.

academic.passage: The concept of artificial intelligence (AI) has gained considerable attention in recent years. AI refers to machines or software that exhibit behaviors considered intelligent. This includes learning, reasoning, and problem-solving capabilities. Researchers are continually exploring how AI can replicate human cognitive functions. Notably, advancements in machine learning, a subset of AI, allow systems to improve their performance based on experience. The intersection of neuroscience and AI is particularly fascinating, as scientists study how the human brain processes information to develop better algorithms. However, ethical considerations regarding the deployment of AI technologies remain a crucial topic of discussion.

questions.q: What is the main topic of the passage?
questions.explain: 這篇文章的主要主題是人工智慧（AI），因為它介紹了AI及其研究。

questions.q: What subset of AI is particularly highlighted in the passage?
questions.explain: 這段文字特別強調機器學習，它是人工智慧的一個子集。

questions.q: What can be inferred about the relationship between neuroscience and AI?
questions.explain: 可以推斷神經科學有助於改善AI算法，因為研究人員研究大腦如何處理信息來開發更好的算法。

questions.q: What does the term 'cognitive functions' refer to in the passage?
questions.explain: 在這篇文章中，認知功能指的是智能行為，因為人工智慧旨在模擬這些行為。

daily.passage: Attention all students! The library will be holding a book fair next Friday from 10 AM to 4 PM. Come explore a variety of genres, meet local authors, and enjoy special discounts on selected titles. Don't miss this great opportunity!

questions.q: What day of the week will the book fair take place?
questions.explain: 書展將在星期五舉行，這是公告中提到的日子。

questions.q: What time will the book fair start?
questions.explain: 公告中提到書展將於上午10點開始。
